name: Filled Lemon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Cream butter; gradually add 1 cup powdered sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Combine flour and salt; add to creamed mixture, beating well. Stir in lemon extract.
3. Flour hands, shape dough into two 16-inch rolls, wrap in wax paper, and chill several hours.
4. Unwrap rolls, cut into 1/4-inch slices, and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 400 degrees for 8 minutes or until browned; cool on wire racks.
6. Spoon filling onto the bottom side of half the cookies, spreading evenly. Place a second cookie on top of filling, top side up, and sprinkle lightly with powdered sugar.
Filling:
1. Combine all ingredients in the top of a double boiler, stirring until blended.
2. Bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and smooth.
3. Chill about 1 hour.
